title: Agent Olympics Longitudinal Snapshot
description: One immutable, append-only snapshot of a round's outcome, derived from a scoreboard. A time-ordered sequence of these snapshots forms the longitudinal record over which drift is computed. Snapshots never mutate existing scored data — they are an additive measurement layer. Each snapshot is identity-bearing but publishable-blindable: the report tool applies the same blind anonymization as the public leaderboard. See docs/longitudinal-measurement.md.

captured_at.description: ISO timestamp when this snapshot was captured. The time axis the longitudinal record is ordered by.

round_id.description: The round this snapshot captures, copied from the source scoreboard.

source_scoreboard_id.description: scoreboard_id of the scoreboard this snapshot was derived from.

source_revision.description: Git HEAD (revision) the snapshot was captured at, for provenance. May be 'unknown' outside a git checkout.

results.description: One compact result per (task_id, participant_id) in the source scoreboard.

participant_id.description: Participant (agent) identifier. Anonymized by the report tool's --blind mode, never stored anonymized here.

total_score.description: Total score from the judge record, or null when scoring is pending or the entry was rejected.

verdict.description: Judge verdict, or null when pending.

status.description: Participant-reported status from the scoreboard entry, plus 'quarantined' for live-runner rejections.

dimensions.description: The six rubric dimension scores captured at this round. Each present dimension carries its score and max; absent (pending) dimensions are omitted.

failure_code.description: Failure-taxonomy code (scripts/lib/failure-taxonomy.js) when this (task,participant) was rejected (quarantined/disqualified). Null otherwise.
